Name: Zaku Ⅱ FZ
Effect: 【When Paired】If there are 4 or more (Cyclops Team) cards in your trash, deploy 2 rested [Ad Balloon]((Civilian)･AP0･HP1･This Unit can't be set as active or paired with a Pilot) Unit tokens.
While you have a Unit with "Ad Balloon" in its card name in play, this Unit can't receive enemy battle damage.
